title: The in universe contributions of Yui
display_title: The in universe contributions of Yui
wikitext:
[]: The in-universe contributions of Yui             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Aug 09, 2022 12:47 am Throughout the series it is often implied that the E-project would've not been completed without Yui. However, besides the paper that Fuyutsuki deems "interesting" and comments on her being "a brilliant scientist", there is little said about Yui's contributions to the in-world science. Unlike Naoko, whose achievements with MAGI are explained in detail, I don't recall anything specific about Yui being said. In Evangelion 3.33, Fuyustuki states that she developed the soul-transfer/body-fusing technology to give the Evas their soul. Is anything like that said in NGE?

[]: Re: The in-universe contributions of Yui             Quote Post by Clowncarcrash » Tue Aug 09, 2022 1:24 am I don’t thing there’s anything in the text outside of her volunteering herself to be a test subject that ended up being her demise.

[]: Re: The in-universe contributions of Yui             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Aug 09, 2022 2:48 pm No, Yui is fairly explicitly stated to have been pretty deeply involved in the research; metanarratively speaking, it is a very common trope in mecha that when an activation experiment of a potentially volatile fighting machine happens, the test pilot is one of the lead scientists working on it, because they know the system the best

[]: Re: The in-universe contributions of Yui             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Aug 09, 2022 2:54 pm Yui was connected with SEELE itself so her contributions might have been overstated especialy because of her young age,it was her that made first contact with Lilith to learn of unit 01 ability as a ark. The E project would have been completed regardless because of the death sea scrolls. Both Rei and Shinji would not have been there without her contribution

[]: Re: The in-universe contributions of Yui             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Aug 11, 2022 11:21 pm Ah I see. Thanks y'all!

Article: The in universe contributions of Yui
[]: The in-universe contributions of Yui             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Aug 09, 2022 12:47 am Throughout the series it is often implied that the E-project would've not been completed without Yui. However, besides the paper that Fuyutsuki deems "interesting" and comments on her being "a brilliant scientist", there is little said about Yui's contributions to the in-world science. Unlike Naoko, whose achievements with MAGI are explained in detail, I don't recall anything specific about Yui being said. In Evangelion 3.33, Fuyustuki states that she developed the soul-transfer/body-fusing technology to give the Evas their soul. Is anything like that said in NGE?

The E project would have been completed regardless because of the death sea scrolls. Both Rei and Shinji would not have been there without her contribution
